summary: All 5 dashboard featured products and category filter features tested and verified working. Featured toggle button, category filter pills (All, Uncategorize, CLOTHS), empty state with 'Clear filters' link, and dynamic product count text all function correctly.
passed_tests: Featured toggle shows star icon and 'Featured' text
Featured toggle turns yellow when active and filters to featured products
Dashboard has category filter pills (All, Uncategorize, CLOTHS)
Category 'All' is selected by default with white background
Category filter updates carousel to show matching items
When CLOTHS category selected (0 products), shows 'No products found' empty state
Empty state shows 'Clear filters' link that resets all filters
Product count text updates: 'Browse 44 products across all categories', '0 products in CLOTHS', '0 featured products'
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js line 31-33 - states for categories, selectedCategory, showFeaturedOnly
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 79-93 - filteredItems useMemo filters by category and featured status
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 487-499 - Featured toggle button with proper data-testid and styling
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 514-546 - Category filter pills with dynamic data-testid
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 570-580 - Empty state with 'No products found' and 'Clear filters' link
VERIFIED: DashboardPage.js lines 505-511 - Dynamic product count text based on filters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Featured products toggle and category filters fully implemented. Categories include: All (44 items), Uncategorized (all items), CLOTHS (0 items). Featured toggle filters to is_featured items. Empty state shows 'No products found' with 'Clear filters' link when no items match. Product count text dynamically updates based on active filters.

featured_toggle_button.evidence: Button with data-testid='featured-toggle' found, shows star icon, turns yellow when active

category_filter_pills.evidence: 3 category pills found: All (category-all), Uncategorize (category-Uncategorized), CLOTHS (category-CLOTHS)

category_filter_updates_carousel.evidence: Selecting CLOTHS shows 0 items, selecting All shows 44 items in carousel

empty_state_with_clear_filters.evidence: CLOTHS category shows 'No products found' with 'Clear filters' link that resets filters

product_count_text_updates.evidence: Text changes to '0 products in CLOTHS', '0 featured products', 'Browse 44 products across all categories'
